title: cachrys maritima
intro: Cachrys maritima, also known as Sea Holly or Rock Rose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Carrot family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cachrys maritima include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Cachrys maritima can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
